description:
Retrieves a list of all hosts associated with the UI account making the API call.

Note: The structure of userData and reportedState fields may vary depending on the UniFi OS or Network Server version. The example provided is based on UniFi OS 4.1.13.

queryParameters.name: pageSize
queryParameters.description: Number of items to return per page

queryParameters.name: nextToken
queryParameters.description: Token for pagination to retrieve the next set of results

fields.name: data
fields.description: Generic response data, specific schema depends on the endpoint

children.name: id
children.description: Unique identifier of the host device

children.name: ipAddress
children.description: Current IP address of the device

children.name: owner
children.description: Indicates if the current user is the owner of this device

children.name: isBlocked
children.description: Indicates if the device is blocked from cloud access

children.name: registrationTime
children.description: Time in RFC3339 format when the device was registered to the cloud

children.name: lastConnectionStateChange
children.description: Time in RFC3339 format when the connection state last changed

children.name: latestBackupTime
children.description: Time in RFC3339 format of the latest device backup

children.name: userData
children.description: User-specific data associated with the device including permissions and role information

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Pagination token for fetching the next set of results

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/hosts?pageSize=10&nextToken=602232A870250000000006C514FF00000000073DD8DB000000006369FDA2:1467082514", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
